programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack and Blakey turn out to be the only entrants in a gardening competition organised by the depot manager's wife. Seventies comedy, starring Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A mysterious delivery causes Poirot to recall the time his supper at a Buenos Aires restaurant was rudely interrupted by the murder of a fellow diner, who unwittingly drank from a glass laced with cyanide. Drama, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings and the Belgian supersleuth investigate a baffling gangland murder which draws them both into the underworld of London's Little Italy. Miss Lemon turns out to have a link with the victim's valet. Whodunit, starring David Suchet and Hugh Fraser(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The peace of an Oxfordshire village is shattered by the apparently motiveless shooting of a woman through her kitchen window. Twenty-four hours later, her next-door neighbour suffers a similar fate. As Morse searches for a link between the victims, he becomes embroiled in an increasingly bitter election contest at an Oxford college. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Richard Briers, Maggie Steed and John Shrapnel(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: In Dover, Lieutenant Colin Race is investigating the deaths of two Navy personnel when a distraught Sheila Webb runs out of 19 Wilbraham Crescent and into his arms. Inside the house, Colin finds the body of a murder victim surrounded by stopped clocks. Mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Massey, Jaime Winstone, Lesley Sharp, Phil Daniels, Geoffrey Palmer and Tessa Peake-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A guest at a village Halloween party boasts of having witnessed a murder years previously - and later meets a grisly end in keeping with the macabre spirit of the occasion. Arriving to investigate, Poirot delves back into the annals of local life - and uncovers a series of mysterious deaths, any one of which could have a bearing on the present case. David Suchet, Amelia Bullmore and Zoe Wanamaker star(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's god-daughter Lydia and her son James - who is severely traumatised by a bombing at his school - come to stay unexpectedly. Struggling to look after the lad when his mother goes missing, Foyle's life suffers a further complication when the body of a local man is found near a military centre - leading him into the top-secret world of weapons research. Kate Fleetwood and Michael Jayston guest star, with Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Farmer Alex Preston is found dead at the sacred Crowcall stone circle in Midsomer Mow. Suspicion initially falls on local druids led by high priests Ezra Canning and Leticia Clifford, since Preston's plans to plough Gorse Meadow would have barred their access to the site. Barnaby and Jones are joined by new pathologist Kate Wilding to investigate, and as the case wears on, the inspector becomes convinced greed rather than spiritualism is the motive. Starring Neil Dudgeon, Jason Hughes and Tamzin Malleson(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective is assigned to investigate when a chocolate factory owner is murdered during a fox hunt. The case leads him to the sleepy Oxfordshire village of Chigton Green, and is soon complicated by the fatal shooting of a local couple with an apparent connection to the first victim. Endeavour uncovers a vicious campaign of gossip and rumour, and meets a local woman who inspires him to consider his future(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Religious fanatic Steven Mullan is found beaten and drowned in his bath. Lewis and Hathaway discover he had been imprisoned for trying to kill well-known atheist Tom Rattan and had only recently been released. The inspector soon has reason to believe the Rattan family is hiding something from him - but nothing prepares him for the evidence Dr Hobson uncovers at the post-mortem. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star, with guest appearances by Jenny Seagrove and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: A human heart is discovered on the shores of the Loch, and forensic psychologist Blake Albrighton is brought in to join the investigating team. He quickly forms a disturbing theory about the motive behind the seemingly inexplicable murders, but Chief Inspector Frank Smilie is quick to dismiss his ideas. However, if the new arrival is correct, the once peaceful Highland community could be set to endure far more deaths, as a serial killer prowls the area. Crime drama, starring Laura Fraser, John Sessions and Don Gilet(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack and Stan volunteer Olive as supervisor for the depot nursery. However, when she breaks her glasses and has to go home for a spare pair the clueless duo are left holding the fort. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant and Anna Karen(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan believes living at home is cramping his style and resolves to find his own place. Vintage comedy with Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper sleuth returns to his home country of Belgium for the first time since the First World War to attend a medal ceremony, only to find a murder case needs solving. Agatha Christie mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Chancellor and David De Keyser(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Conclusion of a two-part storyline. A kidnap case leaves Vernon's plans for Liz and Ben's wedding in chaos, while Helen's dreams of a fresh start for her and Matt look set to be shattered. Jenny is relieved when she finally gets a medical diagnosis explaining her recent symptoms, but the news brings a difficult decision for husband Dennis, who has to choose between his wife and his police career. Starring newcomer Sophie Ward, Oliver Montgomery, Duncan Bell and Sarah Tansey(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Veteran singer and keyboard player Alan Price guest stars in this festive episode of the rural drama, as the leader of a jazz band. Travelling to Aidensfield, where they've been booked by Vernon to play at the villagers' Christmas concert, the Rio Trio offer a lift to a girl, unaware she is a single mum taking her baby home to see her parents for the holiday. However, the first the band know about the infant is when the girl disappears, leaving them to look after it. Meanwhile, as the concert gets into full swing, local barmaid Gina takes centre stage, hoping to impress all and sundry with her rendition of Winter Wonderland. Tricia Penrose, Derek Fowlds, Geoffrey Hughes, William Simons and Mark Jordon star(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is reunited with old friend Ariadne Oliver, who has been commissioned to stage a game of murder hunt at a summer fete in the grounds of Nasse House, the recently purchased home of wealthy financier Sir George Stubbs. However, the novelist's instincts tell her she's getting involved in something much darker - and she's proved right when the girl volunteering to play the part of the victim really does turn out to be dead. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Zoe Wanamaker, Sean Pertwee, Martin Jarvis, Sam Kelly, Sinead Cusack, Rosalind Ayres and Tom Ellis(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is reunited with sidekick Captain Hastings (Hugh Fraser), secretary Miss Lemon (Pauline Moran) and Inspector Japp (Philip Jackson) in a case that plunges him into the world of global espionage as the Second World War looms. The public are in panic after the shocking death of Russian grandmaster Ivan Savaranoff during a game of chess. Poirot must try to determine the good guys from the bad in a complex plot that sees the main figures used like pawns. David Suchet stars in a story adapted by Mark Gatiss and Ian Hallard(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective is given a book on Victorian crimes while languishing in hospital, and soon becomes obsessed with a murder committed in 1859. Convinced the three men hanged for the crime were innocent, he sets out to solve the long-forgotten case. Starring John Thaw, Lisa Eichhorn, Judy Loe, Matthew Finney, James Grout and Clare Holman(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The death of an unpopular art dealer leaves Poirot with a long list of suspects within his tangled, squabbling family - even though his eccentric wife had predicted his end. Detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Emma Fielding, Fiona Walker and Jeremy Northam(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A visiting American academic delivers a controversial speech, with many audience members worried his ideas could be used to target ethnic minorities. So when he is found hanged the next morning and Dr Hobson quickly discounts suicide, Lewis and Hathaway realise they have many suspects - from the local anti-racism activist who was first in voicing her disgust at the professor's beliefs to the women who had bombarded him with threatening e-mails. But then another body turns up and the case takes on a new dimension. David Soul and Patrick Baladi guest star(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Local boy DS Ben Jones is a mine of information for his boss DCI Barnaby when a reclusive elderly couple are murdered in their home and a spate of killings appears to be linked to both a fatal road accident and the disappearance of a teenager 20 years earlier. A bitter struggle over plans to demolish homes in a road development ensues, and wild pronouncements from the local psychic ensure tensions in the village of Dunstan remain at fever pitch. Maggie Steed and Ben Crompton guest star(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The discovery of slaves on the Pritchard farm has turned a murder inquiry into a multi-agency operation. The enormity of the case brings Dodson to Syndicate 9, keen to establish Gill's state of mind and efficacy as senior officer. Having been the driver involved in the fatal collision with Cal Pritchard, Janet is under investigation and unable to interview the man's widow Evie. Devastated by the consequences of her actions, the detective eventually finds solace in Chris's calm and kind reasoning, but when an incandescent Evie smells alcohol on Gill's breath, she has all the ammunition she needs to discredit the case and bring the DCI down(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel steps up to acting DI on a case that becomes bigger and more sinister than it first seemed. Meanwhile, Janet is glad of Rachel's return, having not known how much she was going to need her friend. Starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The duo continue to investigate one of the biggest and darkest cases they have ever faced. In the second edition, Rachel's safety is thrown into question when the killers change the rules of their sick game. Meanwhile, as a police officer, Janet is rendered powerless to protect her daughter, but she knows she must try to find a way to stop the madness. The crime drama returns for a fifth series, this time featuring a single crime throughout three parts. Starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel is criticised for a lack of progress with the investigation and she knows she must find both a murder weapon and the encryption code used to access the website. However, as the team makes a significant breakthrough in the case, DSI Julie Dodson makes a discovery which jeopardises Rachel's position as acting DI. Meanwhile, when Janet's attempt to help Taisie results in a complaint, her faith in justice is tested, and both Scott and Bailey have life-changing decisions to make about their futures. Crime drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth sets out to solve the baffling murder of a Cambridge don who met with foul play shortly after deciding to change his will. Starring David Suchet, Beth Goddard and Mark Kingston(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike is annoyed when Steve offers to buy the unit from him, Maud gets a ramp installed in the shop so she can help out, and Rita wins Reg's raffle(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis is furious when Derek receives an anonymous Valentine, Ben asks Raquel to pose for the brewery's calendar, and Bet has a huge row with Charlie(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Members of the Woolpack are shocked by Annie's hen party, Michael is amazed to find he is under suspicion, and Frank is surprised by the patter of tiny feet(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Annie and Leonard's wedding runs into difficulties, Shirley and Turner are reconciled, and Zoe meets a familiar face at the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The Aidensfield police are puzzled when it seems a face from the past has become the unlikely victim of vandalism, and suspicions are soon aroused over the reasons for his sudden return to the village. Meanwhile, Vernon encounters dangerous wildlife as he stashes his capital in Ashfordly woods, but decides to turn the incident into another money-making scheme. Geoffrey Hughes stars(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Suzy gives Stan food from the canteen to take home - but it's stolen property. When Blakey discovers that Stan and Jack are biting the hand that feeds them, he vows to make trouble. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack feel guilty about an accident in the bus, so they volunteer to care for the Inspector's pets while he is on holiday. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The flatmates come up with a new rule to give their romantic pursuits a chance of privacy - but it means giving 24 hours' notice. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is reunited with sidekick Captain Hastings (Hugh Fraser), secretary Miss Lemon (Pauline Moran) and Inspector Japp (Philip Jackson) in a case that plunges him into the world of global espionage as the Second World War looms. The public are in panic after the shocking death of Russian grandmaster Ivan Savaranoff during a game of chess. Poirot must try to determine the good guys from the bad in a complex plot that sees the main figures used like pawns. David Suchet stars in a story adapted by Mark Gatiss and Ian Hallard(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton faces a race against time to stop a saboteur when Aidensfield hosts a prestigious car hill-climb. Meanwhile, Bernie finds an old car in a cowshed and decides to renovate it, giving Vernon his chance to scoop the winnings in the event. Rural police drama, starring Duncan Bell, Peter Benson and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lorraine reaps the benefits of her artistic skills, Elizabeth is at the end of her tether with the Windsors, and Sarah gets the wrong end of the stick about Kim and Joe(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: An invitation to Joe makes Lynn green with envy, Jayesh sees red at the Emmerdale bonfire, and it is a grey day for the Windsors when someone goes missing(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Emily, Ken, Alf and Audrey join the Wiltons on a trip to London, and Mavis is aghast when they arrive home without Derek. Bet sees the funny side of the Dolly Parton contest(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maud goes to see a finance company, Charlie calls but Bet cannot bring herself to forgive him, and Derek is furious with Mavis for letting the coach go without him(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective finds himself investigating the strange and gruesome murder of an elderly psychiatrist. Elsewhere, Poirot's old friend Ariadne Oliver is being pressed to uncover the truth behind two decade-old deaths. As the pair dig deep for evidence, they soon discover that their separate investigations are linked and join forces to solve the overarching mystery. David Suchet, Zoe Wanamaker and Greta Scacchi star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton faces a race against time to stop a saboteur when Aidensfield hosts a prestigious car hill-climb. Meanwhile, Bernie finds an old car in a cowshed and decides to renovate it, giving Vernon his chance to scoop the winnings in the event. Rural police drama, starring Duncan Bell, Peter Benson and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The curmudgeonly GP struggles to come to terms with his new role as a father, having planned to resume his career as a consultant in London before the arrival of his and Louisa's as-yet unnamed son. To make matters worse, he begins to have serious doubts about the competency of his replacement Dr Di Dibbs when she misdiagnoses a patient as well as herself. Martin is then dealt a devastating personal blow after hearing his aunt Joan has died. Starring Martin Clunes, Joanna Scanlan and Caroline Catz(n)

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the murder of a trainee forensic psychologist, whose body has been dumped in a Northumberland landfill site, surroundings that make evidence of how she died impossible to verify. Vera discovers that the dead woman had been working for the prison service re-investigating a crime that a former prisoner had been convicted of, and realises she must finish what the victim started in order to discover who may have wanted her dead. Paul Kaye plays a new pathologist alongside fellow guest star Peter Davison(n)

programme.title: Innocent
programme.desc: David Collins is unexpectedly acquitted on a technicality having served seven years of a life sentence for the murder of his wife Tara. On the steps of the court, he vows to bring to book those who lied at his original trial, to see the real killer jailed and more importantly, to regain custody of his two young children. Drama, starring Lee Ingleby(n)

programme.title: Hans Christian Andersen: My Life as a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Conclusion of the storyteller's rags-to-riches tale, giving an insight into the people who inspired his fantasy world. Drama, starring Kieran Bew, James Fox, Simon Callow, Emily Hamilton, Geraldine James and Alison Steadman(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack and Blakey turn out to be the only entrants in a gardening competition organised by the depot manager's wife. Seventies comedy, starring Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A mysterious delivery causes Poirot to recall the time his supper at a Buenos Aires restaurant was rudely interrupted by the murder of a fellow diner, who unwittingly drank from a glass laced with cyanide. Drama, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings and the Belgian supersleuth investigate a baffling gangland murder which draws them both into the underworld of London's Little Italy. Miss Lemon turns out to have a link with the victim's valet. Whodunit, starring David Suchet and Hugh Fraser(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The peace of an Oxfordshire village is shattered by the apparently motiveless shooting of a woman through her kitchen window. Twenty-four hours later, her next-door neighbour suffers a similar fate. As Morse searches for a link between the victims, he becomes embroiled in an increasingly bitter election contest at an Oxford college. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Richard Briers, Maggie Steed and John Shrapnel(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: In Dover, Lieutenant Colin Race is investigating the deaths of two Navy personnel when a distraught Sheila Webb runs out of 19 Wilbraham Crescent and into his arms. Inside the house, Colin finds the body of a murder victim surrounded by stopped clocks. Mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Massey, Jaime Winstone, Lesley Sharp, Phil Daniels, Geoffrey Palmer and Tessa Peake-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A guest at a village Halloween party boasts of having witnessed a murder years previously - and later meets a grisly end in keeping with the macabre spirit of the occasion. Arriving to investigate, Poirot delves back into the annals of local life - and uncovers a series of mysterious deaths, any one of which could have a bearing on the present case. David Suchet, Amelia Bullmore and Zoe Wanamaker star(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's god-daughter Lydia and her son James - who is severely traumatised by a bombing at his school - come to stay unexpectedly. Struggling to look after the lad when his mother goes missing, Foyle's life suffers a further complication when the body of a local man is found near a military centre - leading him into the top-secret world of weapons research. Kate Fleetwood and Michael Jayston guest star, with Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Farmer Alex Preston is found dead at the sacred Crowcall stone circle in Midsomer Mow. Suspicion initially falls on local druids led by high priests Ezra Canning and Leticia Clifford, since Preston's plans to plough Gorse Meadow would have barred their access to the site. Barnaby and Jones are joined by new pathologist Kate Wilding to investigate, and as the case wears on, the inspector becomes convinced greed rather than spiritualism is the motive. Starring Neil Dudgeon, Jason Hughes and Tamzin Malleson(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective is assigned to investigate when a chocolate factory owner is murdered during a fox hunt. The case leads him to the sleepy Oxfordshire village of Chigton Green, and is soon complicated by the fatal shooting of a local couple with an apparent connection to the first victim. Endeavour uncovers a vicious campaign of gossip and rumour, and meets a local woman who inspires him to consider his future(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Religious fanatic Steven Mullan is found beaten and drowned in his bath. Lewis and Hathaway discover he had been imprisoned for trying to kill well-known atheist Tom Rattan and had only recently been released. The inspector soon has reason to believe the Rattan family is hiding something from him - but nothing prepares him for the evidence Dr Hobson uncovers at the post-mortem. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star, with guest appearances by Jenny Seagrove and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: A human heart is discovered on the shores of the Loch, and forensic psychologist Blake Albrighton is brought in to join the investigating team. He quickly forms a disturbing theory about the motive behind the seemingly inexplicable murders, but Chief Inspector Frank Smilie is quick to dismiss his ideas. However, if the new arrival is correct, the once peaceful Highland community could be set to endure far more deaths, as a serial killer prowls the area. Crime drama, starring Laura Fraser, John Sessions and Don Gilet(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack and Stan volunteer Olive as supervisor for the depot nursery. However, when she breaks her glasses and has to go home for a spare pair the clueless duo are left holding the fort. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant and Anna Karen(n)

programme.desc: An invitation to Joe makes Lynn green with envy, Jayesh sees red at the Emmerdale bonfire, and it is a grey day for the Windsors when someone goes missing(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Emily, Ken, Alf and Audrey join the Wiltons on a trip to London, and Mavis is aghast when they arrive home without Derek. Bet sees the funny side of the Dolly Parton contest(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maud goes to see a finance company, Charlie calls but Bet cannot bring herself to forgive him, and Derek is furious with Mavis for letting the coach go without him(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective finds himself investigating the strange and gruesome murder of an elderly psychiatrist. Elsewhere, Poirot's old friend Ariadne Oliver is being pressed to uncover the truth behind two decade-old deaths. As the pair dig deep for evidence, they soon discover that their separate investigations are linked and join forces to solve the overarching mystery. David Suchet, Zoe Wanamaker and Greta Scacchi star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton faces a race against time to stop a saboteur when Aidensfield hosts a prestigious car hill-climb. Meanwhile, Bernie finds an old car in a cowshed and decides to renovate it, giving Vernon his chance to scoop the winnings in the event. Rural police drama, starring Duncan Bell, Peter Benson and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The curmudgeonly GP struggles to come to terms with his new role as a father, having planned to resume his career as a consultant in London before the arrival of his and Louisa's as-yet unnamed son. To make matters worse, he begins to have serious doubts about the competency of his replacement Dr Di Dibbs when she misdiagnoses a patient as well as herself. Martin is then dealt a devastating personal blow after hearing his aunt Joan has died. Starring Martin Clunes, Joanna Scanlan and Caroline Catz(n)

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the murder of a trainee forensic psychologist, whose body has been dumped in a Northumberland landfill site, surroundings that make evidence of how she died impossible to verify. Vera discovers that the dead woman had been working for the prison service re-investigating a crime that a former prisoner had been convicted of, and realises she must finish what the victim started in order to discover who may have wanted her dead. Paul Kaye plays a new pathologist alongside fellow guest star Peter Davison(n)

programme.title: World of Sport: Kings of the Canvas
programme.desc: Richard Henwood takes a look back at the glory days of British wrestling with some classic action from ITV's sport archives(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: A senator heading an investigation on organised crime is threatened by figures determined to silence him, so Harry and the Contessa are assigned to keep him under surveillance(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The resources of CI5 are stretched when a mentally unbalanced former soldier starts killing hospital staff, believing them responsible for the death of his wife and for the brain damage suffered by his young daughter. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey are joined by former Olympic 400m hurdle champion Sally Gunnell and reality star-turned-photographer Anna 'AK' Kelle on the competitive angling show, heading to Essex to try their hands at pole fishing(n)

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: Monty is in need of a new job after being sacked by Joyce, and has to decide whether to swallow his pride and go to Sir Henry, or see if Mr Wu has a fitting position for him. Meanwhile, Loretta and Eddie make secret plans for an anniversary party for Billy and Sheron back in the UK, but it looks as if the couple are making plans of their own. Elsewhere, things are not going well for Kenneth as he wakes up in Blow & Go after a big night out, only to realise that the builders have inadvertently bricked him in(n)

programme.title: Ronin (1998)
programme.desc: A freelance former US intelligence agent is recruited alongside a team of fellow mercenaries to take part in an international plot to capture a briefcase from a gang of criminals. However, after the mission is completed, one member of the crew decides to betray his equally ruthless comrades-in-arms - with inevitably explosive results. John Frankenheimer's action thriller, starring Robert De Niro, Jean Reno, Natascha McElhone, Sean Bean, Stellan Skarsgard and Jonathan Pryce(n)

programme.desc: Arthur witnesses the untimely death of a business acquaintance, for which Chisholm appears to hold an old friend of Terry's accountable. programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan's holiday is disrupted by the escape of a violent psychopath from prison. Tim Cook, dubbed 'The Leopard' by the press has vowed murderous revenge on the detective inspector for his earlier capture, and has friends on the outside prepared to harbour him while he plans his attack. Crime drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: A reclusive industrial magnate asks Harry to engineer his brother's escape from a prison on a Mediterranean island, where he is being held on a trumped-up charge. Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt star(n)

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neil presents action from Brands Hatch, featuring round 28 of the British F4 Championship and round 25 of the Michelin Ginetta Junior Championship(n)

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The team travels to South Africa to drive everything from rally cars, to supercars and military vehicles. Tiff Needell and Vicki Butler-Henderson visit Paramount Group, makers of the fastest, toughest, military vehicles around using the company's off road facilities to try them out. Tiff drives Lamborghini's new supercar the Huracan along the stunning coast roads south of Cape Town. He also gets a taste of the Dakar Rally, one of the most gruelling motorsport events on the planet. Tiff is also joined by Dakar veteran Geniel de Villiers for some flat out laps(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The lure of easy money beckons once again as Terry and Arthur appreciate the commercial possibilities of cheap tobacco, but it is not long before the would-be smugglers are all at sea. Comedy, starring George Cole, Dennis Waterman and Ray Winstone(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to keep a surveillance on Cowley after evidence suggests he has stolen two canisters of a lethal nerve gas and begun negotiating with an unfriendly foreign power. The plot thickens when they trace their boss to a country mansion, where after they are caught he denies knowing them(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.desc: Team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey are joined by former Olympic 400m hurdle champion Sally Gunnell and reality star-turned-photographer Anna 'AK' Kelle on the competitive angling show, heading to Essex to try their hands at pole fishing(n)

programme.title: Tommy Cooper
programme.desc: Arthur Lowe guests as an uptight censor, trying to keep a tight rein on the tricks and jokes. With Sheena Marsh, Frank Coda and John Lord(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar agrees to help a girl find her missing brother and becomes embroiled in a drug-smuggling operation. Roger Moore and Burt Kwouk star(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates a rape committed by two men - one of whom later killed the other. The victim's father decides to take the law into his own hands. Guest starring Kathleen Quinlan(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: With his reputation and credibility on the line, Quincy races against the clock to confirm the skull of an apparent murder victim is that of a union leader who disappeared in mysterious circumstances two years previously. Jack Klugman stars(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is repaid a debt in dodgy £20 notes, but by the time it comes to light they are counterfeit his creditor is heading on a flight to India. Once the Winchester is pinpointed as the source of the forged currency, Arthur also finds he has Chisholm breathing down his neck. Robbie Coltrane and Art Malik guest star, with George Cole and Patrick Malahide(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are pitted against KGB assassins when a CI5 operative is apparently raised from the dead. A proposed exchange finds Cowley at a deserted aerodrome, and a burst of gunfire apparently leaves his life on the line. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar finds a suspicious building in Wales which is being used as a research laboratory, plunging him into the midst of a spine-chilling adventure. Spy drama, directed by and starring Roger Moore(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo works with the FBI on apprehending a drug dealer, an operation that leaves a police officer dead. The FBI agents prove less than helpful when it comes to catching the killer(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Sam hands in his notice, but not before unsuccessfully trying to dissuade Quincy from investigating the sudden death of a Japanese martial arts movie star(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Apparently successful entrepreneur Clive Cosgrove loses his 'confidence' after Arthur and Terry attend his wedding celebrations. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Patrick Mower, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Embarrassing Bodies presenter Dr Christian Jessen, Jonathan Benjamin 'JB' Gill of JLS, comedienne Helen Lederer and former professional snooker player Stephen Hendry pit their wits against the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for their charity of choice. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove experience mixed results at the Stafford Show - the biggest classic motorcycle auction and autojumble in the United Kingdom(n)

programme.desc: Maverick cop 'Dirty' Harry Callahan is unwillingly teamed up with a female partner as he takes on terrorists who have stolen a shipment of weapons and explosives and plan to hold the city of San Francisco to ransom. programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Homelessness is on the rise in the UK, but nobody knows how many pregnant women face the possibility of having their baby without a home to go back to. This programme explores the issue of expectant mothers who find themselves with no place to call home, and conducts a survey of midwives in collaboration with the Royal College of Midwives to try to get a sense of the scale of the problem. Ninety-five per cent of the midwives asked strongly felt that homelessness puts the health of the women and their unborn babies at risk. The report follows three women - two of whom are heavily pregnant - experiencing evictions, overcrowding and the reality of living in temporary accommodation for years on end(n)

programme.title: Save Well, Spend Better

The team includes entrepreneur Bianca Miller Cole, global wealth consultant Ann Wilson, financial adviser Emmanuel Asuquo, and life coach Anna Williamson. programme.title: Home Free

programme.desc: Alex Dilmaghani v Francisco Fonseca. Coverage of the bout for the vacant WBA International Super Featherweight title at York Hall in London. This contest was called off at the last minute in September when Fonseca was advised by a doctor to withdraw. Kent's Dilmaghani is looking to claim the first title of his professional career and extend his 15-fight winning streak with a victory against the Nicaraguan, who has a creditable record of 25 wins, two defeats and one draw, but is fighting outside of North America for the first time. With commentary by Dave Farrar and Richie Woodhall(n)

programme.title: Greatest Sci-Fi Movies

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow charts the life of Greek artist Domenicos Theotocopolous, dubbed El Greco, one of the most distinctive painters of the 16th century. His work was considered to be ahead of its time - so much so that it was all but ignored for 300 years. El Greco developed a highly individualistic style that eventually proved enormously influential, paving the way for the Baroque and providing the inspiration for 20th-century expressionism(n)

programme.title: Alaska: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Documentary following four seasons in the north American state, beginning with winter where temperatures are cold enough to freeze the ocean, and snowfall is measured in feet rather than inches. As temperatures hit minus 60 and food becomes scarce, animals such as foxes and hares moult, turning their colourful coats white to camouflage themselves in the snow. Cameras follow wildlife such as American red squirrels, who battle to hang onto food caches. Meanwhile, on the treeless plains, ancient musk ox are forced to search for theirs(n)

Family comedy sequel, starring Zachary Gordon and Steve Zahn(n)

Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs(n)

Action comedy based on a comic book, starring Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson(n)

Thriller, starring Peyton Kennedy, Richard Schiff and Kip Pardue(n)

Brian De Palma's sci-fi horror, starring Kirk Douglas, Andrew Stevens, John Cassavetes, Carrie Snodgress and Amy Irving(n)

Animated adventure, with the voices of Amanda Seyfried, Josh Hutcherson, Colin Farrell and Christoph Waltz(n)

programme.title: Sunshine on Leith (2013)

Musical featuring songs by the Proclaimers, starring George MacKay, Kevin Guthrie, Peter Mullan and Jane Horrocks(n)

programme.title: The Indian in the Cupboard (1995)

He repeats the experiment with more of his toys, and realises he is creating real people - and is responsible for their wellbeing. Children's fantasy, with Hal Scardino, Litefoot and Steve Coogan(n)

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)

Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)

Fact-based drama, starring Mark Wahlberg, Taylor Kitsch, Emile Hirsch and Ben Foster(n)

Fantasy adventure, starring Luke Evans, Dominic Cooper and Charles Dance(n)

Fantasy thriller based on Seth Grahame-Smith's novel, starring Benjamin Walker and Dominic Cooper(n)

programme.title: Die Hard 2 (1990)

Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Bonnie Bedelia, William Sadler, Franco Nero and William Atherton(n)

Sci-fi adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Pilou Asbæk and Juliette Binoche(n)

programme.title: The Frozen Phenomenon

programme.title: The Goldbergs

However, when she wins the bet, Erica opts out of celebrating Thanksgiving so Beverly has to find a way to win her daughter back to the celebrations. Uncle Marvin visits and unexpectedly bonds with Adam. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is excited when a modelling agency representative approaches him, but Erica thinks it's a scam. Meanwhile, Adam tries to get Murray to build bridges with his father(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: It Was Alright In

programme.title: The World's Most Famous Train
programme.desc: During its nine-month-long season, the Venice Simplon-Orient-Express makes over 60 journeys, covering 150,000 kilometres, with the majority of trips between London and Venice. The train is comprised of 17 unique 1920s carriages that have transported a host of elite individuals across Italy, Switzerland, and Turkey for more than a century. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crew members take drastic steps to reset a patient's dangerously fast heartbeat, a cyclist crashes in a remote area, and a motorist is injured in a road accident(n)

Plus, an intoxicated man overdosed on paracetamol, insists on another drink rather than going to hospital(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The wildlife on the great plains of Africa, Asia, North America and the Arctic, which cover a quarter of the land on Earth. The distinctive Tibetan fox is captured on film for the first time, while a herd of caribou migrates 2,000 miles across the tundra in search of grass. However, the guests are less than impressed with the food, especially the main course - a curry made from frozen fish - but will a bit of belly dancing, Bollywood-style, help save the day? Meanwhile, singer Petrina and drummer Rob continue their flirting both at and away from the table(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

As a single man living in his stepmother's house, Rob thinks his competitors will see him as an underdog, so is intent on pulling out all the stops(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Will tonight be the night, or will he shy away when he discovers Petrina has sung in the West End and worked with dozens of household names?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

However, poor food doesn't deter a romantic Rob from popping the question to Petrina, sending shockwaves across the dining room. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim(n)

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo is reunited with his old flame, Jeanne Benoit, when insurgents in Sudan attack a group of volunteer doctors, including her husband. Travelling to the crime scene to conduct a joint murder-kidnapping investigation, Dinozzi and McGee offer their assistance in searching for the missing doctors. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Sean Murray, with Scottie Thompson(n)

programme.desc: Stabler tries to rescue a youngster who has been kidnapped by a man with schizophrenia, but resorts to unorthodox tactics that jeopardise his own career. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of a child's body sends Stabler and Cragen in search of a suspected paedophile, but important medical evidence emerges that implicates someone close to the child. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An infant ingests cocaine that has been mixed into baby food but Internal Affairs blocks the investigation, so the team goes undercover to expose a drug ring run by corrupt cops. programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. programme.desc: Nine men with limited childcare experience, who are either fathers or hope to have children soon, try to improve their skills by working in nurseries, taking on a variety of tasks such as nappy changing and supervising playtime. programme.desc: Laurence Rees looks at how Hitler formed a connection with millions of Germans and generated a level of charismatic attraction almost without parallel in the process. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
